question: The scatter plot shows daily screen time vs. hours of sleep. Which statement is most consistent with the data?

options.A: People who spend more time on screens tend to sleep longer.
options.B: People who spend more time on screens tend to sleep fewer hours.
options.C: There is no clear relationship between screen time and sleep.
options.D: Sleep duration stays roughly the same regardless of screen time.

explanation: This scatter plot uses dual encoding: point position shows the relationship, but point size and color also encode the x-variable, making high values overly salient. That can tempt viewers to overstate the strength or form of the relationship.
